view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding rule rows with specific attributes, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm or deny the existence of these attributes. The linked use case mentions the need for rule rows with predicate type, severity, priority, and consequence policy, but lacks specific evidence of their implementation or validation. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
